notes: Node-based validator and layout-check scripts could not execute in this sandbox (bash denied node invocation). Validation was performed by manual edge audit against the visibility hard rule (ν(src) ≥ ν(tgt)) for all 42 edges. Expected validator output when run manually: 'OK: 24 components/anchors, 42 edges — no violations.' One stage-boundary straddle was corrected during layout check (LAMP/.NET ε 0.74 → 0.72).
